jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Biocon - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Biocon in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Biocon:
Biocon is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Biocon!
